enforcement_timeline.Aug_2027: Full enforcement including Annex III high-risk systems

prohibited_ai.description: Use of AI for biometric categorisation based on race, ethnicity, sexual orientation, or political opinion
Social scoring systems that assign individuals scores on creditworthiness or reliability based on their social behaviour
prohibited_ai.exceptions: Narrow exceptions for financial or social security institutions

prohibited_ai.description: Real-time remote biometric identification of individuals in public spaces
prohibited_ai.exceptions: Law enforcement with strict safeguards and judicial oversight

prohibited_ai.description: Emotion recognition in law enforcement, border management, migration or asylum processing

high_risk_categories.description: Biometric identification and authentication of natural persons (excluding emotion recognition)
Critical infrastructure management in energy, transport, water, electricity sectors
Determining access to or determining outcomes in education and vocational training
Recruitment, selection, promotion, termination, task allocation or performance monitoring of workers
Access to or delivery of essential private or public services (healthcare, housing, credit, insurance)
Law enforcement AI affecting natural persons' fundamental rights
Management of migration, asylum, visa issuance and border control
Administration of justice and democratic processes

high_risk_requirements: Article 9: Risk management system (design, implementation, continuous monitoring)
Article 10: Data governance (training data quality, governance, documentation)
Article 11: Technical documentation and record keeping
Article 12: Transparency and provision of information to authorities
Article 13: Transparency obligations to end users
Article 14: Human oversight (capacity to override or interrupt)
Annex IV: Technical documentation (15 items including model training, testing, performance metrics)
limited_risk_requirements: Article 50: Transparency obligations for certain AI systems (chatbots, deepfakes, recommended content ranking)
minimal_risk_requirements: No mandatory requirements, but best practices recommended

risk_classification_rules.rule: If system is in prohibited_ai list → PROHIBITED
risk_classification_rules.severity: Critical — do not deploy in EU

risk_classification_rules.rule: If system is in high_risk_categories list → HIGH_RISK
If system is a chatbot, deepfake generator, or content ranking system → LIMITED_RISK

FI.name: Finland
FI.supervisor: Office of the Data Protection Ombudsman

FR.supervisor: CNIL (Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés)
